contracts.PolicyOperationsContract: Read-only policy operations contract. No production writes. Unknown policy truth remains unknown.
contracts.ProductSourcePackContract: Source packs are evidence inputs only. They do not invent products, rates, benefits or eligibility.
contracts.EligibilityContract: Eligibility output is evidence-labeled and may be UNKNOWN/BLOCKED. It is not approval or permission.
contracts.QuotePreviewContract: Quote preview is non-binding, evidence-bound and requires Product Catalog, Source Pack, Eligibility and Calculation contracts.
